title: ED renal colic documentation

investigations.text: Supports clinician-reviewed CT or ultrasound imaging with age and pregnancy qualifiers.
investigations.rationale: The exact NICE stone-imaging section supports documenting existing test or imaging status only when performed or reviewed; it does not infer a stone or recommend imaging.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports clinician-reviewed CT or ultrasound imaging with age and pregnancy qualifiers.

source.title: Renal and ureteric stones: assessment and management

investigations.text: Supports stone analysis, serum-calcium context, and qualified paediatric specialist metabolic assessment.
investigations.rationale: The exact metabolic-testing section supports a clinician-entered documentation plan and arranged specialist or follow-up discussion only for a clinician-established stone context; it does not order tests.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports stone analysis, serum-calcium context, and qualified paediatric specialist metabolic assessment.

source.title: Renal and ureteric stones: assessment and management

follow_up.text: Supports documenting hydration or dietary context and prevention advice only when discussed by the clinician; numeric instructions are not mapped.
follow_up.rationale: Recurrence-prevention recommendations were reviewed but not mapped to automatic advice.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Supports documenting hydration or dietary context and prevention advice only when discussed by the clinician; numeric instructions are not mapped.

source_limitations: Pain history, urinary symptoms, fever, single kidney, pregnancy, examination, urinalysis, renal function, infection, diagnosis, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure and disposition remain unsupported.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
